summary: Sales Order Review Page feature testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Review page loads at /review/:id with document header, BC Sales Order panel with auto-preflight, line preview, Add Line button, Approve/Flag buttons. Navigation from My Queue and Triage Queue to /review/:id working. Full Detail link navigates to /documents/:id. Back button returns to queue.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/sales-dashboard/demo/run-batch creates 5 batch-child PO documents with document_type=PurchaseOrder
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Order Review Page feature fully tested. Route /review/:id loads SalesOrderReviewPage. Backend endpoint POST /api/sales-dashboard/review/{doc_id} added to support approve/flag actions. Preflight endpoint POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns ready=True with customer C-10250 and 1 line item for batch-split POs. Line Preview shows correct item (24oz Glass Jar) with qty 62.062 and price $234.74. Add Line button visible and functional. My Queue and Triage Queue navigate to /review/:id. Full Detail link navigates to /documents/:id. Back button returns to queue.

verified: Document header shows PO number, customer name, amount
Auto-runs preflight when autoRun=true and forceShow=true
Shows environment banner (Read: Production, Write: Sandbox)
Shows document summary with all fields
Shows validation checklist with green checkmarks
Line item: 24oz Glass Jar, qty 62.062, price $234.74
Displays correct item description: 24oz, 63-2030, Lug, Flint, Glass, Pasta, Jar, FH
Button visible with '+ Add Line' text
Clicking adds new editable line row
Shows flag reason at bottom of page
Clicking navigates back to queue page
Accepts action='approve' - updates status to approved
Accepts action='flag' with reason - updates status to flagged

mocked_apis.note: BC Sandbox and SharePoint Graph API calls are mocked via DEMO_MODE - expected behavior
